# Di avslöjar: Rekordstor personalbonus i Vattenfall

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-05-01  
**Market Sentiment**: Negative

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

This episode of a Dagens Industri podcast investigates the state-owned power giant Vattenfall, focusing on its opaque variable compensation program that paid nearly 1 billion SEK last year amid record profits (Q1 profit up 200% to 18 billion SEK). The hosts criticize the lack of transparency around bonuses to energy traders and contrast Vattenfall CEO Anna Borg's ~20 million SEK salary with that of fellow state-owned LKAB. The discussion is investigative and critical rather than offering any investment view.

---

## Recommendations

_No signals for universe stocks in this episode._
